metadata.title: Writing Studio
metadata.description: Local MDX authoring space for the writing section of Timothy Okooboh’s portfolio.

shell.title: Writing Studio
shell.description: A local MDX workflow for drafting, editing, and previewing articles before they are published.

auth.title: Local studio access
auth.description: No hosted sign-in is required for the local writing workflow. The studio opens directly on localhost and stays out of the deployed experience.
auth.success: Magic link sent. Check your inbox to continue.
auth.requestFailed: Something went wrong while requesting the magic link.

setup.title: Local authoring workflow
setup.description: These writing routes are intended for localhost during development. The public portfolio can stay static while the authoring space lives beside the codebase.
setup.note: Articles now live as local MDX files inside the repository. Draft, publish, and iterate here, then commit the content changes the same way you commit code.

dashboard.title: All writing
dashboard.description: A simple view of published essays and drafts from the local MDX source, built for quick scanning, editing, and publishing.

editor.description: Write directly against the local MDX content model. This editor supports metadata, article body content, fenced code blocks, markdown images, and the custom demo components used on the public article pages.
editor.bodyDescription: Use markdown, fenced code blocks, markdown images, or the approved MDX components to shape the article.
editor.sectionsDescription: This preview reflects the current MDX headings in the editor body.
editor.previewDescription: A lightweight preview of the hero metadata that will frame the public article.
editor.previewEmptyDescription: Write a clear lead that explains what the article is about and why it matters.
editor.previewEmptySummary: Shape a concise summary that works on cards, callouts, and archive views.
editor.structureEmpty: No H2 sections detected yet. Start adding headings like ## Context or ## Implementation.
editor.notAvailable: This article does not exist in the local content source yet.
editor.newDescriptionPlaceholder: Write the lead paragraph that appears in the article hero.
editor.newSummaryPlaceholder: A concise summary of what the article teaches.
editor.bodyExample:
## Context

Explain the problem clearly.

```tsx
export function ExampleCard() {
  return <section aria-labelledby="title">Preview</section>;
}
```

![Design system relationship map](/images/writing/design-system-feedback-loop.svg "Optional caption")

<WritingCallout eyebrow="Key idea" title="Why this matters">
  Use MDX when plain markdown is not expressive enough.
</WritingCallout>

<ArticleDemo demoId="feedback-surface" />

errors.slugTaken: This slug is already being used by another article.
errors.validationError: Fix the highlighted fields and try again.
